title: Physiology PhD Program Application and Fees
content:
Physiology PhD Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring Semester online application deadline: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 18, 2026

SCIENCE EXAM:

Date: Thursday, January 22, 2026

Time: 2:00 PM

Exam Venue: Üsküdar University Health Campus, Classroom 911

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

ALES Score Type:

NUMERICAL (COUNT)

Click for Online Pre-Registration Link

Physiology Doctorate Program

Application and Fees

Graduates of the Faculty of Medicine and those who have a master's degree in Physiology are accepted to this program. According to Üsküdar University Graduate Education and Examination Regulations, the required conditions must be met.

Documents required during registration:

– Original or certified copy of the Medical Faculty diploma or Master's diploma

- Original or certified copy of Medical School diploma or Master's transcript (transcript)

Click to Download Foreign Language Exams Equivalency Document

- Copy of identity card

- Photo (2 Pieces)

Note: Applicants will be selected in order of success.
